---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example: "Users currently
cannot cancel an appointment once it has been booked."

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. If it involves a new workflow or node
changes, outline the high-level design.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer the
proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
